frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper needle loading and initial approach to target

frame_analyses.description: Both instruments working to place suture through drain at marked locations
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good bimanual coordination during suture placement

frame_analyses.description: Beginning formation of first throw, instruments positioning suture for surgeon's knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper setup for double throw technique

frame_analyses.description: Completing surgeon's knot with double throw technique using right-handed approach
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Excellent surgeon's knot formation with proper double wrap

Executing final single throw with hand switch from left back to right
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good completion of knot sequence with proper hand alternation

frame_analyses.description: Preparing to cut suture ends with instruments positioned for cutting
Task completed with knot secured and suture ends cut, drain slit appears closed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion with no visible gap in drain slit

knot_assessments.notes: Excellent surgeon's knot with proper double throw technique
Proper single throw with correct hand switching

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears completely closed with no visible gap, knot properly positioned

technique_summary: Excellent performance demonstrating proficient laparoscopic suturing skills with proper surgeon's knot technique and correct hand switching sequence. Task completed efficiently with minimal penalties.
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly more precise initial suture placement to minimize deviation from target marks
strengths: Perfect surgeon's knot formation with double throw
Excellent hand switching technique between all throws
Complete drain slit closure with secure knot
